name: TransactionEvent
description: Represents a single event in the lifecycle of a transaction, such as an authorization, capture, refund, or void.

id.description: A unique identifier for the transaction event.

amount.description: The amount associated with this event in the smallest currency unit.

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for this event.

fee.description: The fee charged by Affirm for this event in the smallest currency unit.

created.description: The time when this event was created, in RFC 3339 format.

reference_id.description: An external reference identifier associated with this event.

metadata.description: Additional key-value metadata associated with this event for merchant tracking purposes.
